warnings.message: GCP BigQuery is stable-final for the documented batch BigQuery surface. Streaming, advanced write modes, non-Workflows deployment runners, automatic native Dataplex lineage/aspect emission during every contract run, raw Iceberg paths, JDBC/Delta Sharing and live governance-ledger reconciliation are explicitly outside this scoped claim.

query.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `midyear-system-499521-p3.contractforge_gcp_usgs_rest_ops.contractforge_lineage_evidence` ( run_id STRING NOT NULL, target_table STRING NOT NULL, source_name STRING NOT NULL, event_json STRING NOT NULL, event_time TIMESTAMP, adapter STRING NOT NULL )

CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE `midyear-system-499521-p3.contractforge_gcp_usgs_rest_ops.cf_schema_probe_e2e97f73a399` AS SELECT * FROM ( WITH parsed AS ( SELECT raw_response, response_page_number, PARSE_JSON(raw_response) AS payload FROM `midyear-system-499521-p3.contractforge_gcp_usgs_rest_bronze.b_usgs_earthquake_geojson` ), flattened AS ( SELECT raw_response, response_page_number, payload, feature FROM parsed, UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(payload, '$.features')) AS feature ), shaped AS ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(payload, '$.metadata.generated') AS INT64) AS feed_generated_epoch_ms, JSON_VALUE(payload, '$.metadata.title') AS feed_title, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(payload, '$.metadata.count') AS INT64) AS feed_event_count, JSON_VALUE(payload, '$.metadata.api') AS feed_api_version, JSON_QUERY(payload, '$.bbox') AS feed_bbox, JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.id') AS earthquake_id, JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.type') AS geojson_feature_type, JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.title') AS event_title, JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.place') AS place, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.mag') AS FLOAT64) AS magnitude, LOWER(NULLIF(TRIM(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.magType')), '')) AS magnitude_type, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.time') AS INT64) AS event_epoch_ms, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.updated') AS INT64) AS updated_epoch_ms, LOWER(NULLIF(TRIM(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.status')), '')) AS event_status, LOWER(NULLIF(TRIM(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.type')), '')) AS event_type, LOWER(NULLIF(TRIM(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.alert')), '')) AS alert_level, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.tsunami') AS INT64) AS tsunami_flag, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.sig') AS INT64) AS significance, LOWER(TRIM(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.net'))) AS network, JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.code') AS network_event_code, JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.url') AS event_url, JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.detail') AS detail_url, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.felt') AS INT64) AS felt_reports, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.cdi') AS FLOAT64) AS community_intensity, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.properties.mmi') AS FLOAT64) AS instrumental_intensity, JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.geometry.type') AS geometry_type, JSON_QUERY(feature, '$.geometry.coordinates') AS coordinates, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.geometry.coordinates[0]') AS FLOAT64) AS longitude, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.geometry.coordinates[1]') AS FLOAT64) AS latitude, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.geometry.coordinates[2]') AS FLOAT64) AS depth_km FROM flattened ) SELECT feed_generated_epoch_ms, feed_title, feed_event_count, feed_api_version, feed_bbox, earthquake_id, geojson_feature_type, event_title, place, magnitude, magnitude_type, event_epoch_ms, updated_epoch_ms, event_status, event_type, alert_level, tsunami_flag, significance, network, network_event_code, event_url, detail_url, felt_reports, community_intensity, instrumental_intensity, geometry_type, coordinates, longitude, latitude, depth_km, TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(event_epoch_ms) AS event_time, TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(updated_epoch_ms) AS updated_at, TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(feed_generated_epoch_ms) AS feed_generated_at, DATE(TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(event_epoch_ms)) AS event_date, CASE WHEN magnitude IS NULL THEN 'unknown' WHEN magnitude < 3 THEN 'minor' WHEN magnitude < 5 THEN 'light' WHEN magnitude < 7 THEN 'strong' ELSE 'major' END AS magnitude_band, tsunami_flag = 1 AS is_tsunami_related, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS normalized_at_utc FROM shaped WHERE earthquake_id IS NOT NULL QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY earthquake_id ORDER BY updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, feed_generated_at DESC NULLS LAST ) = 1 ) AS contractforge_schema_source WHERE FALSE

SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, ordinal_position FROM `midyear-system-499521-p3.contractforge_gcp_usgs_rest_ops.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS` WHERE table_name = 'cf_schema_probe_e2e97f73a399' ORDER BY ordinal_position

geometry_type, JSON_QUERY(feature, '$.geometry.coordinates') AS coordinates, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.geometry.coordinates[0]') AS FLOAT64) AS longitude, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.geometry.coordinates[1]') AS FLOAT64) AS latitude, SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(feature, '$.geometry.coordinates[2]') AS FLOAT64) AS depth_km FROM flattened ) SELECT feed_generated_epoch_ms, feed_title, feed_event_count, feed_api_version, feed_bbox, earthquake_id, geojson_feature_type, event_title, place, magnitude, magnitude_type, event_epoch_ms, updated_epoch_ms, event_status, event_type, alert_level, tsunami_flag, significance, network, network_event_code, event_url, detail_url, felt_reports, community_intensity, instrumental_intensity, geometry_type, coordinates, longitude, latitude, depth_km, TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(event_epoch_ms) AS event_time, TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(updated_epoch_ms) AS updated_at, TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(feed_generated_epoch_ms) AS feed_generated_at, substeps: $114 := case_no_value(is_null(SAFE_EXPR(CAST($255 AS DOUBLE))), 'unknown', less(SAFE_EXPR(CAST($255 AS DOUBLE)), 3), 'minor', ...)

$100 := ROW_NUMBER($369) OVER (PARTITION BY $382 ORDER BY $371 DESC, $372 DESC)

warnings.message: Additive schema policy requires adapter-managed schema evolution.

GCP BigQuery is stable-final for the documented batch BigQuery surface. Streaming, advanced write modes, non-Workflows deployment runners, automatic native Dataplex lineage/aspect emission during every contract run, raw Iceberg paths, JDBC/Delta Sharing and live governance-ledger reconciliation are explicitly outside this scoped claim.
